name: chain_my_client_asked_for_a_full_brand_strateg
method:
My client asked for a full brand strategy.

3 weeks. $8,000 budget.

I opened Claude.
Pasted one mega-prompt.
Had the entire strategy in 14 minutes.

Here are the prompts that replaced the process 

(

stages.task: Scan Upwork/Fiverr/Reddit for brand strategy RFPs and small biz owners asking for branding help
Generate custom proposal from client brief using mega-prompt library preview as proof of capability
On client accept: run full 12-prompt brand strategy suite against client brief, assemble deliverable
After delivery, pitch ongoing content calendar and social media strategy as retainer ($500-1500/mo)
